purpose: Candidate draft for Shandong 2025 first-choice filing table source review.

evidence.license_or_citation_notes: Official Shandong exam authority page and xls attachment identified. Page footer says unauthorized copying, reprinting, or mirroring is prohibited, so source usage still needs separate authorization/citation review before approval.

review_notes: Not an approval. Official page, attachment, data category, and published year are identified; keep blocked until usage/citation terms are reviewed and a human reviewer records approval.
non_goals: Does not modify the source registry.

Does not modify seed data, RAG indexes, or Agent-visible data.
